title: VSEPR Molecular Geometry Builder
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive VSEPR model that animates electron/molecular geometries as electron groups and lone pairs change.

learningObjectives: Determine electron and molecular geometry from electron groups and lone pairs
Explain how lone pairs modify bond angles

keyQuestions: Why do lone pairs occupy equatorial positions first in trigonal bipyramids?
commonMisconceptions: Lone pairs can be placed anywhere
Electron and molecular geometry names are identical
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to predict the geometry for a given AXmEn and confirm using the simulator
